title: AISC 360-22 Bolt Group Coefficient Calculator
description: Determine the Bolt Group Coefficient as per AISC 360-22.

designMethod.description: Design Methodology. Symbol: -. A method for sizing structural elements based on the loads they are subjected to, used to define load combinations and safety or resistance factors in design.

boltSize.description: Bolt Size. Symbol: -. Units: in. Select the size of the bolt element to be used in the analysis.

boltType.description: Bolt Grade. Symbol: -. Bolt grade to be used in the connection: ‘X’ refers to bolts where the threads are excluded from the shear plane, while ‘N’ refers to bolts where the threads are included in the shear plane.

blC.description: Loading Condition. Symbol: -. The number of shear planes through which the force is transmitted in the bolt.

cTP.description: Type of Connection. You can choose between a normal shear connection or a slip critical connection.

toH.description: Type of Hole connection. Symbol: -. Select the type of hole used on the slip critical connection.

nsP.description: Number of Slip Planes. Symbol: n_{s}. Number of planes to be considered in the slip critical connection.

msC.description: Mean Slip Coefficient. Symbol: -. Mean Slip Coefficient according to the surface condition.

P_ult.description: Magnitude (Pu). Symbol: P_{ult}. Units: kip. Applied load magnitude, considering relevant load combinations, that is supported by the bolt group.

angle.description: Angle. Symbol: \theta. Units: °. Applied load angle (positive values are rotated clockwise from the downward direction).

ALBP.description: Base Point. Symbol: -. Select the insertion point to be used in the analysis.

x_load.description: X Coordinate Offset. Symbol: -. Units: in. X coordinate of the applied load, relative to the insertion point to be used in the analysis.

y_load.description: Y Coordinate Offset. Symbol: -. Units: in. Y coordinate of the applied load, relative to the insertion point to be used in the analysis.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
